rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE guarantees by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or remove invalid clauses
Move implementation-level bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes when diagnostics reference subcomponent paths or outputs
generic_rules: When AGREE reports 'named thing must be an expression with a type', trace and resolve the first unresolved identifier on the same line
If AGREE diagnostics reference implementation-level features in a component type annex, relocate valid bindings to the implementation scope
Validate that all AGREE identifiers are declared or visible in the current annex before use
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid annex scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings
Use only visible AADL features or helper declarations in the same annex when writing AGREE clauses
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix AGREE reference errors; instead, resolve the root cause or remove invalid clauses
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about annex placement
Component type annexes for implementation-level bindings
